subcodes.first_line: O ye who are favored and accepted at the Threshold of Glory! Jinab-i-Amin hath forwarded your letter and petition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبلان و مقبولان درگه کبریا جناب امین مکتوب شما را ارسال نمودند و استدعای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
